title: Earlier cognitive training improves working memory in adults
abstract: A randomized study reported that cognitive training improved working-memory scores in healthy adults, with moderate effects after four weeks.

title: Mixed transfer effects after cognitive training
abstract: A replication found mixed evidence for far-transfer gains from cognitive training, with improvements limited to trained tasks.

title: Contrastive pretraining improves low-resource text classification
abstract: A machine learning experiment showed that contrastive pretraining improved low-resource classification accuracy across several benchmark datasets.

title: Follow-up citing the target cognitive training paper
abstract: This later paper discusses the Target cognitive training and working memory trial.
